summary: Video set to music. Two large vertical banners reading 'AMERICAN WORKERS FIRST' hang down the facade of the Department of Labor building, one with a portrait of Trump and one with a portrait of an earlier president, beside a large American flag. A crowd in suits films on phones. The shots use slow camera moves and a color grade. The clip ends on a black card with the Department of Labor seal.

script.scene: Crowd in suits seen from behind filming on phones. Two large vertical banners reading 'AMERICAN WORKERS FIRST' (Trump portrait left, earlier president portrait right) hang on the DOL building with US flags.
Wider shot: a large American flag unfurls down the center of the facade between the two banners; crowd watches and records.
Symmetrical shot of the full facade: flag centered, 'FIRST' banners on either side, blue-sky daylight, color grade.
Camera tilts to crowd silhouettes in the foreground against the banner-draped building; dim toning.
Cut to black end card: white 'Department of Labor / United States of America' seal.

notable_text: DEPARTMENT OF LABOR UNITED STATES OF AMERICA
